metadata.name: Draft a Motion for Summary Judgment

description: A litigation associate needs to draft a motion for summary judgment, arguing that there are no genuine disputes of material fact.

nodes.task_description: Review the case file, including all pleadings, discovery responses, and deposition transcripts.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gathers all relevant factual evidence.

nodes.task_description: Research legal precedents supporting the argument for summary judgment in this jurisdiction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds 3-5 relevant case law examples.

nodes.task_description: Draft the motion, including a statement of undisputed facts, the legal argument citing the research, and a conclusion.

expected_outcome.value: Agent produces a well-structured and persuasive legal brief.
